# QS-DMSS Studio

QS-DMSS Studio is the public front door for QS-DMSS: open-source scientific
Python software for evidence-first QuantumScalar dark matter simulation
workflows.

Canonical website: https://qs-dmss.studio/
Hosted demo: https://app.qs-dmss.studio/
Repository: https://github.com/AI-Bio-Synergy-Holdings-LLC/QS-DMSS
Release target: v0.13.0 (release candidate; not yet published)
Latest published PyPI package: https://pypi.org/project/qs-dmss/0.12.0/
Project DOI: https://doi.org/10.5281/zenodo.20074924
Latest archived release DOI: https://doi.org/10.5281/zenodo.21329711
Open Collective: https://opencollective.com/qs-dmss

QS-DMSS helps users run simulations, inspect evidence, compare campaigns,
record public reference-data provenance, verify/replay outputs, and publish
reproducible research artifacts.

The v0.13.0 release candidate adds a live local quantum-validation harness,
Research Runbook, and contextual Evidence Assistant. It is not a published
package or archived DOI until its release gates complete.

Important boundaries:
- QS-DMSS is beta for reproducible package/evidence workflows.
- QS-DMSS is not peer-reviewed scientific validation.
- Public source provenance is workflow evidence, not provider-data model
  calibration.
- Dry-run Slurm request bundles do not submit scheduler jobs.
- Quantum-readiness artifacts are provider-neutral and simulator-only: no
  provider credentials, remote API, QPU execution, submission, or authorized
  spend.
- Hosted-demo outputs are temporary, and arbitrary configs/uploads are disabled.

Key docs:
- Reviewer packet: https://github.com/AI-Bio-Synergy-Holdings-LLC/QS-DMSS/blob/main/docs/reviewer-packet.md
- Conceptual reference map: https://github.com/AI-Bio-Synergy-Holdings-LLC/QS-DMSS/blob/main/docs/conceptual-reference-map.md
- Reference-data calibration: https://github.com/AI-Bio-Synergy-Holdings-LLC/QS-DMSS/blob/main/docs/reference-data-calibration.md
- Fractal SSFM validation spine: https://github.com/AI-Bio-Synergy-Holdings-LLC/QS-DMSS/blob/main/docs/fractal-quadrant-ssfm-validation-spine.md
- Quantum compilation validation: https://github.com/AI-Bio-Synergy-Holdings-LLC/QS-DMSS/blob/main/docs/quantum-compilation-validation.md
